title: Capacity Planning Decision Flow: Virtualization vs. Cloud Computing
description: A flowchart illustrating the decision-making process for choosing between virtualization and cloud computing strategies based on capacity planning requirements.
relationships: Starts with assessing Business Application Requirements, flows to evaluating On-Premise Infrastructure capacity, branches to either implementing a Virtualization Layer for VMs or provisioning Public Cloud Services, converges into a Hybrid Cloud Environment managed by IT Operations Team
